# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Write secure code.
# Category: datastore_security


# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration
snapshot:
  repository:
    s3:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: "my-elasticsearch-backups"
        region: "us-west-2"
        endpoint: "s3.amazonaws.com"
        access_key: "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}"
        secret_key: "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"
        chunk_size: 100mb
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        readonly: true
    fs:
      type: fs
      settings:
        location: "/mnt/backups/elasticsearch"
        compress: true
        concurrent_streams: 5
        max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 20mb
        readonly: true

  schedule:
    daily:
      cron: "0 0 * * *"
      enabled: true
      repository: "s3"
      name: "daily-snapshot-{now/d}"
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      wait_for_completion: true
      max_wait_time: 3600s
    weekly:
      cron: "0 0 * * 0"
      enabled: true
      repository: "s3"
      name: "weekly-snapshot-{now/w}"
      indices: "*"
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      wait_for_completion: true
      max_wait_time: 3600s

  retention:
    policy:
      daily:
        max_count: 7
        delete_after: 7d
      weekly:
        max_count: 4
        delete_after: 30d

  security:
    roles:
      snapshot_admin:
        cluster:
          - "cluster:monitor/main"
          - "cluster:admin/repository/put"
          - "cluster:admin/repository/get"
          - "cluster:admin/repository/delete"
          - "cluster:admin/snapshot/create"
          - "cluster:admin/snapshot/get"
          - "cluster:admin/snapshot/delete"
          - "cluster:admin/snapshot/restore"
        indices:
          - "index:admin/indices/create"
          - "index:admin/indices/delete"
          - "index:admin/indices/shrink"
          - "index:admin/indices/clone"
          - "index:admin/indices/refresh"
          - "index:admin/indices/flush"
          - "index:admin/indices/get"
          - "index:admin/indices/put"
          - "index:admin/indices/analyze"
          - "index:admin/indices/validate/query"
          - "index:admin/indices/segments"
          - "index:admin/indices/mapping/put"
          - "index:admin/indices/mapping/get"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/put"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/get"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/delete"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/exists"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias"

          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index"
          - "index:admin/indices/alias/resolve/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias/index/alias"
